objective: Add wait state telemetry for long running Windows continuous integration checks.
implementation: Added node 15 post-merge lifecycle evidence after PR 318 CI, merge, sync, and branch cleanup.
Added Windows CI wait-state telemetry over recent PR #317 and PR #318 production-readiness matrices.
Recorded pending-before-success wait states and observed Windows check durations above the 600 second long-running threshold.
Added a regression test that binds the telemetry to node 15 readback and confirms no promotion or RSI claim is introduced.
